summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Adaptiv Select ETF (ADPV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that toggles between US large-cap equities and short-term US Treasurys, based on momentum. The fund's strategy aims to limit drawdowns during market downtrends. ADPV was launched on Nov 4, 2022 and is issued by Adaptiv.

data.title: CLIENT FIRST TAX & WEALTH ADVISORS ANNOUNCES NEW ADAPTIV™ SELECT ETF (TICKER: ADPV); A PROPRIETARY ACTIVELY MANAGED, LARGE CAP STOCK SELECTION ETF
data.text: MILWAUKEE , Nov. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Client First Tax & Wealth Advisors announced today it is in the pre-effective stage of launching its first exchange traded fund (ETF); Adaptiv™ Select ETF (tic...

news.t: CLIENT FIRST TAX & WEALTH ADVISORS ANNOUNCES NEW ADAPTIV™ SELECT ETF (TICKER: ADPV); A PROPRIETARY ACTIVELY MANAGED, LARGE CAP STOCK SELECTION ETF

holdings.infoBox: ADPV is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are Intel stock at 5.48%, Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 4.65%, Viatris at 4.62%, Viavi Solutions at 4.48%, and Roivant Sciences at 4.40%.
